name: Code Review Pipeline
description: Review code for bugs, style issues, and improvements

agents.name: Code Reader
agents.purpose: Read and understand the code to be reviewed
agents.system_prompt_hint: Read the provided code carefully. Understand the logic, identify all functions, and note any immediate concerns.

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.purpose: Review code for bugs, style issues, and improvements
agents.system_prompt_hint: Review the code thoroughly. Check for bugs, security issues, performance problems, style inconsistencies, and suggest improvements.

suggestion_card.title: Code Review
suggestion_card.subtitle: Get your code reviewed for bugs and improvements

author: agentfactory
